que: What does feature-based architecture organize code around?
options: App features such as search, profile, or checkout

que: Which Android guidance is most closely related to feature-based architecture at scale?
Which is a likely feature module name in a modular Android app?
What is one benefit Android lists for modularization?
Why can feature-based architecture help team ownership?
options: Because code boundaries can align more closely with product areas
Because it removes the need for modules
Because it merges all features into one file

que: What is a common mistake with feature-based architecture?
options: Over-modularizing a small app too early
Keeping shared utilities in core modules

que: Where should code used by many features usually live?
What should good feature modules generally have?
options: Only UI code with no logic

que: Why might feature-based architecture improve build times in larger codebases?
options: Because modularization can reduce the impact of changes across the whole codebase

que: Which official docs best support this topic?
options: Android modularization and app architecture guides
